result:
The cleaned and harmonized dataset has been successfully generated and saved to `data/output/cleaned_data.csv`. The file contains the following variables:

- `NSID` (cohort member identifier)
- `nssecma14`, `nssecpa14` (Mother/Father NS-SEC at age 14)
- `nssecma15`, `nssecpa15` (Mother/Father NS-SEC at age 15)
- `nssecma16`, `nssecpa16` (Mother/Father NS-SEC at age 16)
- `nssecma17`, `nssecpa17` (Mother/Father NS-SEC at age 17)
- `nssecma18`, `nssecpa18` (Mother/Father NS-SEC at age 18)

All NS-SEC variables are harmonized to the 17-category classification with proper handling of missing values.
